title: Complete Search String "Exotic pets and zoonotic spillover risk: epidemiology and antibacterial resistance, a rapid systematic review"
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"235aj","text":"This protocol describes the complete search string, Boolean operators, and inclusion/exclusion criteria used for the rapid systematic review on exotic pets and zoonoses","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: ("exotic pets" OR "non-traditional pets") AND("zoonoses" OR "zoonotic spillover") AND("antimicrobial resistance") AND ("wildlife trade")
Databases searched: Web of Science Scopus Google Scholar

Inclusion criteria Document type: research articles, review articles Year: 2010–2025 Language: English Area: worldwide Exclusion criteria Non-original publications (books, chapters, conference proceedings) Articles published before 2010 Articles in languages other than English
creator: Mouslim BARA
